scenarios.title: Find Previous Shoe Size in Taobao
scenarios.description: Open Taobao order history on Android, find the previously searched sports shoe order, and report the shoe size.

scenarios.title: Post GUI Agent Papers to Xiaohongshu
scenarios.description: Research recent GUI Agent papers, draft a Xiaohongshu post, and publish it from the Android app after one retry.

scenarios.title: Erase GUI-CLAW and Windows
scenarios.description: Use the eraser tool in Goodnotes on iPad to remove the texts "GUI-CLAW" and "Windows" from the current page.

scenarios.title: Save Shenzhen Ten Peaks to Notes
scenarios.description: Research Shenzhen Ten Peaks, summarize the beginner-friendly option closest to Futian District, and save the findings into iPad Notes.

scenarios.title: Open Recommended Ergonomic Chair on JD
scenarios.description: Research ergonomic chair recommendations under 2000 RMB, summarize the ranking, and open the top product detail page on Mac Safari.
